value.results:
={{ {
  submission_id: $json.submission_id,
  submitted_at: $json.submitted_at,
  contact: { email: $json.email, company: $json.company },
  scoring: $json.scoring,
  banding: $json.banding,
  pillarInsights: $json.pillarInsights,
  revenueWaterfall: $json.revenueWaterfall,
qualification: $json.qualification,
  radarUrl: $json.radarUrl
} }}

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/145.0.0.0

answers.questionText: How are you engaging new leads at the point of enquiry?
On average, how long does it take from point of enquiry to first conversational engagement for your clients?
Can your clients ask questions and book appointments 24/7, 7 days a week?
What percentage of new leads schedule an appointment/call without human intervention?
What percentage of processes are repetitive/manual? (E.g. data entry, spreadsheet work, report generating, compliance, follow up, copy/paste between systems)
How often do issues show up in your business later than you'd like? (e.g. missed steps, delays, errors, unhappy clients)
answers.answerText: Occasionally - issues surface after some damage is done

answers.questionText: Do you track key revenue metrics in one place e.g. time to lead engagement, conversion %, staff deflection savings, pipeline coverage, and sales cycle length?
answers.answerText: >50% - we don't know what we don't know, and should be measuring more metrics which impact our service and revenue.

answers.questionText: On average how much time per week does each client facing team member spend performing non revenue generating tasks?
If your business sends and receives client documents or request signatures:
answers.answerText: We request any documents or signatures via email from the client

answers.questionText: What best describes your **current** situation? (not all aspects may be relevant, just pick the best fit).
answers.answerText: No AI/automation. <50% new leads book & attend appointments. Below desired sales conversion. High repetitive admin. Medium-high GDPR risk & time loss through email/doc requests. Lead gen & marketing unsatisfactory (ROAS/CRO/CAC/CPL/Copy & Creatives). KPI data has manual elements and metrics/display could be improved.

answers.questionText: How many new enquiries/leads does your business typically receive per month?
What is your average deal/transaction value?
What best describes the outcome you're looking for? (Select all that apply)
answerText: Time saving deflection ROI - more output per unit of time, fewer manual processes
'Done For You' AI sales system with guaranteed attendance and conversion improvement
'Done For You' AI lead generation with guaranteed ROAS improvement (full ad account management)
Growth without friction or linear headcount requirements

answers.questionText: What has prevented you from implementing an comprehensive AI strategy previously? (Select all that apply)
answerText: We've tried other platforms/apps and the technology did not meet our standards, solve a problem, or evidence sufficient ROI/use case
We've found options are too expensive
We don't want to commit to upfront payments, retainers or contracts without evidence that the system produces results for our business specifically
We have yet to find a comprehensive solution which can implement AI infrastructure across all departments - most services only solve one or two problems
